subject: WM-0178 ready for review
body: P2 fixed by shared raw-sample statistics recomputation with Object.is across all five fields and distinct invalid-statistics versus finite-mismatch errors; focused tests pass 2 files/15 tests; read-only audit passes 31 JSON/sidecar pairs, 29 benchmark artifacts/99 results, final 21 OK results, and 62 files hash-unchanged; full quality passes 78 files/475 tests; no admission or performance benchmark rerun.
